topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Arduino. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for IoT Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Arduino is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Arduino in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Arduino snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Arduino?
How does Arduino handle memory management?
